final_prompt.prompt:
Create a presentation cover slide for a domestic financing announcement about "gpt5.5发布" (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a professional domestic Chinese VC roadshow aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a PPT cover slide layout, title area at top, speaker name at bottom
Subject: must include "gpt5.5发布" as the main headline
Scene/backdrop: needs a GP/VC investment pitch atmosphere — exact backdrop treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a professional, high-stakes roadshow atmosphere — exact mood is yours
Color palette: needs a GP-appropriate professional direction — exact color scheme is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "gpt5.5发布" (main title), "奥特曼" (speaker name)
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve domestic Chinese roadshow conventions and GP tone
Avoid: must avoid Western tech conference cliches, must avoid generic startup pitch aesthetics
